scenarios.title: Meeting a New Classmate
scenarios.description: Practice saying hello and starting a conversation.

scenarios.title: Asking a Teacher for Help
scenarios.description: Practice how to ask your teacher for help politely.

scenarios.title: Joining a Group Project
scenarios.description: Learn how to join a group and contribute.

scenarios.title: Borrowing a Classmate's Pen
scenarios.description: Practice asking politely to borrow something.

scenarios.title: Apologizing to a Friend
scenarios.description: Learn to say sorry in a genuine and caring way.

scenarios.title: Saying No Politely
scenarios.description: Practice declining requests kindly but clearly.

scenarios.title: Giving a Compliment
scenarios.description: Practice noticing something good and saying it out loud.

scenarios.title: Accepting a Compliment
scenarios.description: Learn to receive kind words gracefully.

scenarios.title: Asking Someone to Repeat
scenarios.description: Practice saying you didn't hear and asking kindly.

scenarios.title: Sharing Your Opinion in Class
scenarios.description: Practice speaking up and sharing your view.

gr_a1_bridge.say: You see someone new sitting alone in class. Time to say hello.

gr_a1_q1.say: Can you wave and say hi to the new student?

gr_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Can you wave and say hi to the new student?

gr_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hi there! I'm new here too. Let's keep going.

gr_a1_q2.say: They smile back. Can you tell them your name?
gr_a1_q2.hint: Say: My name is ... or I'm ...

gr_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They smile back. Can you tell them your name?
gr_a1_q2_r.hint: Say: My name is ... or I'm ...

gr_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: My name is Alex. Nice to meet you. Let's keep going.

gr_a1_q3.say: They say their name is Sam. Can you say it's nice to meet them?

gr_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say their name is Sam. Can you say it's nice to meet them?

gr_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Nice to meet you, Sam. Let's keep going.

gr_a1_q4.say: Sam asks which class you are in. Can you tell them?
gr_a1_q4.hint: Say: I'm in grade ... or I'm in room ...

gr_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam asks which class you are in. Can you tell them?
gr_a1_q4_r.hint: Say: I'm in grade ... or I'm in room ...

gr_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I'm in grade ten, room twelve. Let's keep going.

gr_a1_q5.say: Sam seems friendly. Can you say something positive like this seems like a good class?
gr_a1_q5.hint: Say: This seems like a fun class!

gr_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam seems friendly. Can you say something positive like this seems like a good class?
gr_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: This seems like a fun class!

gr_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: This looks like a really good class. Let's keep going.

gr_a2_bridge.say: You and Sam are getting along. Let's keep the conversation going.

gr_a2_q1.say: Ask Sam if they just moved to this school.
gr_a2_q1.hint: Say: Did you just move here? or Are you new?

gr_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam if they just moved to this school.
gr_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: Did you just move here? or Are you new?

gr_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Did you just move here? I noticed I haven't seen you before. Let's keep going.

gr_a2_q2.say: Sam says yes they moved last week. Say something kind about that.
gr_a2_q2.hint: Say: That must be exciting or That's a big change!

gr_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam says yes they moved last week. Say something kind about that.
gr_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: That must be exciting or That's a big change!

gr_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: That must be exciting but also a big change. Let's keep going.

gr_a2_q3.say: Tell Sam you remember what it felt like to be new.
gr_a2_q3.hint: Say: I know how that feels or I remember being new too

gr_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell Sam you remember what it felt like to be new.
gr_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: I know how that feels or I remember being new too

gr_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I know how that feels. I remember being new here. Let's keep going.

gr_a2_q4.say: Sam looks relieved. Can you tell them the teachers here are nice?
gr_a2_q4.hint: Say: The teachers here are really nice and helpful

gr_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam looks relieved. Can you tell them the teachers here are nice?
gr_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: The teachers here are really nice and helpful

gr_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: The teachers here are really nice and helpful. Let's keep going.

gr_a2_q5.say: Offer to show Sam around the school.
gr_a2_q5.hint: Say: I can show you around if you want

gr_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Offer to show Sam around the school.
gr_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: I can show you around if you want

gr_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can show you around the school if you'd like. Let's keep going.

gr_a3_bridge.say: Now let's find out a bit more about Sam.

gr_a3_q1.say: Ask Sam what their favourite subject is.
gr_a3_q1.hint: Say: What's your favourite subject? or What class do you like?

gr_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam what their favourite subject is.
gr_a3_q1_r.hint: Say: What's your favourite subject? or What class do you like?

gr_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: What is your favourite subject?. Let's keep going.

gr_a3_q2.say: Sam says they love science. React positively.
gr_a3_q2.hint: Say: That's cool! Science is great or I like science too

gr_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam says they love science. React positively.
gr_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: That's cool! Science is great or I like science too

gr_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: That's cool! Science is one of my favourite subjects too. Let's keep going.

gr_a3_q3.say: Tell Sam what your favourite subject is.
gr_a3_q3.hint: Say: Mine is ... or I really enjoy ...

gr_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell Sam what your favourite subject is.
gr_a3_q3_r.hint: Say: Mine is ... or I really enjoy ...

gr_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: My favourite is English. I love reading and writing. Let's keep going.

gr_a3_q4.say: Ask Sam if they play any sports or have hobbies.
gr_a3_q4.hint: Say: Do you play any sports? or What do you like to do?

gr_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam if they play any sports or have hobbies.
gr_a3_q4_r.hint: Say: Do you play any sports? or What do you like to do?

gr_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Do you play any sports or have any hobbies?. Let's keep going.

gr_a3_q5.say: Sam mentions they play basketball. Show interest.
gr_a3_q5.hint: Say: That's awesome! I love watching basketball

gr_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam mentions they play basketball. Show interest.
gr_a3_q5_r.hint: Say: That's awesome! I love watching basketball

gr_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: That's awesome! Basketball is so much fun to watch. Let's keep going.

gr_a4_bridge.say: You're doing great. Let's talk about things you have in common.

gr_a4_q1.say: Ask Sam if they watch any TV shows or listen to music.
gr_a4_q1.hint: Say: Do you watch any good shows? or What music do you like?

gr_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam if they watch any TV shows or listen to music.
gr_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: Do you watch any good shows? or What music do you like?

gr_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Do you watch any good TV shows or listen to music?. Let's keep going.

gr_a4_q2.say: Sam names a show you've seen. Tell them you've seen it.
gr_a4_q2.hint: Say: I've seen that! or I know that show, it's great!

gr_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam names a show you've seen. Tell them you've seen it.
gr_a4_q2_r.hint: Say: I've seen that! or I know that show, it's great!

gr_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I've seen that show! It's really good. Let's keep going.

gr_a4_q3.say: Share your favourite show or song with Sam.
gr_a4_q3.hint: Say: My favourite show is ... or I really like ...

gr_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Share your favourite show or song with Sam.
gr_a4_q3_r.hint: Say: My favourite show is ... or I really like ...

gr_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: My favourite show is one about cooking competitions. Let's keep going.

gr_a4_q4.say: Sam smiles. Can you say you think you two will get along well?
gr_a4_q4.hint: Say: I think we're going to get along really well

gr_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam smiles. Can you say you think you two will get along well?
gr_a4_q4_r.hint: Say: I think we're going to get along really well

gr_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I think we are going to get along really well. Let's keep going.

gr_a4_q5.say: Ask Sam if they want to sit together at lunch.
gr_a4_q5.hint: Say: Do you want to sit together at lunch?

gr_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam if they want to sit together at lunch.
gr_a4_q5_r.hint: Say: Do you want to sit together at lunch?

gr_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Do you want to sit together at lunch today?. Let's keep going.

gr_a5_bridge.say: Almost done — let's wrap this conversation up nicely.

gr_a5_q1.say: Sam says yes to lunch! Show you're happy about that.
gr_a5_q1.hint: Say: Great! or That's awesome! I'm really glad

gr_a5_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam says yes to lunch! Show you're happy about that.
gr_a5_q1_r.hint: Say: Great! or That's awesome! I'm really glad

gr_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Great! I'm really glad. It will be fun. Let's keep going.

gr_a5_q2.say: Tell Sam you can introduce them to your other friends.
gr_a5_q2.hint: Say: I can introduce you to my friends too

gr_a5_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell Sam you can introduce them to your other friends.
gr_a5_q2_r.hint: Say: I can introduce you to my friends too

gr_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I can also introduce you to some of my other friends. Let's keep going.

gr_a5_q3.say: Sam thanks you for being so welcoming. Respond kindly.
gr_a5_q3.hint: Say: Of course! or No problem, I'm happy to help

gr_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam thanks you for being so welcoming. Respond kindly.
gr_a5_q3_r.hint: Say: Of course! or No problem, I'm happy to help

gr_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Of course! No problem at all. I'm happy to help. Let's keep going.

gr_a5_q4.say: Ask Sam if they are feeling less nervous about the new school.
gr_a5_q4.hint: Say: Are you feeling a bit better about everything?

gr_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam if they are feeling less nervous about the new school.
gr_a5_q4_r.hint: Say: Are you feeling a bit better about everything?

gr_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Are you feeling a bit less nervous about everything?. Let's keep going.

gr_a5_q5.say: Sam says yes. Say something encouraging to close.
gr_a5_q5.hint: Say: Good! You've got this. And I'm here if you need anything

gr_a5_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam says yes. Say something encouraging to close.
gr_a5_q5_r.hint: Say: Good! You've got this. And I'm here if you need anything

gr_a5_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Good! You've got this. And I'm here if you need anything. Let's keep going.

gr_a6_bridge.say: The school day is almost over. One last friendly exchange.

gr_a6_q1.say: Tell Sam it was great meeting them today.
gr_a6_q1.hint: Say: It was really great meeting you today!

gr_a6_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell Sam it was great meeting them today.
gr_a6_q1_r.hint: Say: It was really great meeting you today!

gr_a6_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: It was really great meeting you today. Let's keep going.

gr_a6_q2.say: Ask Sam if they found their way around okay.
gr_a6_q2.hint: Say: Did you find your way around okay? or Did you get lost?

gr_a6_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam if they found their way around okay.
gr_a6_q2_r.hint: Say: Did you find your way around okay? or Did you get lost?

gr_a6_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Did you manage to find your way around okay?. Let's keep going.

gr_a6_q3.say: Sam laughs and says a little bit. Sympathize and laugh.
gr_a6_q3.hint: Say: Ha! I got lost on my first day too, don't worry

gr_a6_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam laughs and says a little bit. Sympathize and laugh.
gr_a6_q3_r.hint: Say: Ha! I got lost on my first day too, don't worry

gr_a6_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Ha! I got lost on my first day too. It happens. Let's keep going.

gr_a6_q4.say: Remind Sam they can always ask you for help.
gr_a6_q4.hint: Say: You can always ask me if you need help

gr_a6_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Remind Sam they can always ask you for help.
gr_a6_q4_r.hint: Say: You can always ask me if you need help

gr_a6_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: You can always ask me if you need help with anything. Let's keep going.

gr_a6_q5.say: Sam smiles. Give them one final encouraging word.
gr_a6_q5.hint: Say: You're going to be just fine here. See you tomorrow!

gr_a6_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam smiles. Give them one final encouraging word.
gr_a6_q5_r.hint: Say: You're going to be just fine here. See you tomorrow!

gr_a6_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: You are going to be just fine here. See you tomorrow. Let's keep going.

gr_a7_bridge.say: Next day — you see Sam again in the hallway.

gr_a7_q1.say: Wave to Sam in the hallway and say good morning.
gr_a7_q1.hint: Say: Good morning! or Hey Sam!

gr_a7_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Wave to Sam in the hallway and say good morning.
gr_a7_q1_r.hint: Say: Good morning! or Hey Sam!

gr_a7_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Good morning Sam! Great to see you again. Let's keep going.

gr_a7_q2.say: Ask Sam how their evening was.
gr_a7_q2.hint: Say: How was your evening? or Did you have a good night?

gr_a7_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask Sam how their evening was.
gr_a7_q2_r.hint: Say: How was your evening? or Did you have a good night?

gr_a7_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: How was your evening? Did you settle in okay?. Let's keep going.

gr_a7_q3.say: Sam says it was good. Say that's great to hear.
gr_a7_q3.hint: Say: That's great to hear! or Glad to hear that

gr_a7_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam says it was good. Say that's great to hear.
gr_a7_q3_r.hint: Say: That's great to hear! or Glad to hear that

gr_a7_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: That is great to hear! I am glad. Let's keep going.

gr_a7_q4.say: Tell Sam you saved them a seat in class.
gr_a7_q4.hint: Say: I saved you a seat in class!

gr_a7_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell Sam you saved them a seat in class.
gr_a7_q4_r.hint: Say: I saved you a seat in class!

gr_a7_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I saved you a seat in class. Come sit with me. Let's keep going.

gr_a7_q5.say: Sam beams. Invite them to walk to class together.
gr_a7_q5.hint: Say: Let's walk to class together!

gr_a7_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Sam beams. Invite them to walk to class together.
gr_a7_q5_r.hint: Say: Let's walk to class together!

gr_a7_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Let's walk to class together. Come on. Let's keep going.

gr_a8_bridge.say: Final act — introducing Sam to another friend.

gr_a8_q1.say: You spot your friend Jamie. Tell Sam you want to introduce them.
gr_a8_q1.hint: Say: I want you to meet my friend!

gr_a8_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. You spot your friend Jamie. Tell Sam you want to introduce them.
gr_a8_q1_r.hint: Say: I want you to meet my friend!

gr_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I want you to meet one of my friends. Let's keep going.

gr_a8_q2.say: Walk up to Jamie and say hey, you want them to meet someone.
gr_a8_q2.hint: Say: Hey Jamie! I want you to meet Sam

gr_a8_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Walk up to Jamie and say hey, you want them to meet someone.
gr_a8_q2_r.hint: Say: Hey Jamie! I want you to meet Sam

gr_a8_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey Jamie! I want you to meet Sam, they're new here. Let's keep going.

gr_a8_q3.say: Tell Jamie something nice about Sam.
gr_a8_q3.hint: Say: Sam is really nice. We have a lot in common

gr_a8_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell Jamie something nice about Sam.
gr_a8_q3_r.hint: Say: Sam is really nice. We have a lot in common

gr_a8_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Sam is really nice. We have a lot in common. Let's keep going.

gr_a8_q4.say: Encourage Sam to say hello to Jamie.
gr_a8_q4.hint: Say: Go ahead Sam, say hi!

gr_a8_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Encourage Sam to say hello to Jamie.
gr_a8_q4_r.hint: Say: Go ahead Sam, say hi!

gr_a8_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Go ahead Sam, say hi! Jamie is really friendly. Let's keep going.

gr_a8_q5.say: All three of you laugh. Say this is the start of a great friendship.
gr_a8_q5.hint: Say: I think this is the start of a great friendship!

gr_a8_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. All three of you laugh. Say this is the start of a great friendship.
gr_a8_q5_r.hint: Say: I think this is the start of a great friendship!

gr_a8_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I think this is the start of a great friendship. Let's keep going.

gr_win.say: Amazing! You made a new friend today. That took courage. You earned a star!

at_a1_bridge.say: You are in class and there is something you do not understand.

at_a1_q1.say: The teacher is at their desk. How do you get their attention politely?
at_a1_q1.hint: Say: Excuse me or Raise your hand

at_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The teacher is at their desk. How do you get their attention politely?
at_a1_q1_r.hint: Say: Excuse me or Raise your hand

at_a1_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Excuse me, could I ask you something?. Let's keep going.

at_a1_q2.say: The teacher looks up and says yes. How do you say you need help?
at_a1_q2.hint: Say: I need some help please or I have a question

at_a1_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The teacher looks up and says yes. How do you say you need help?
at_a1_q2_r.hint: Say: I need some help please or I have a question

at_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I need some help please. I have a question. Let's keep going.

at_a1_q3.say: The teacher nods. Tell them which subject or topic this is about.
at_a1_q3.hint: Say: It's about ... or I'm working on ...

at_a1_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The teacher nods. Tell them which subject or topic this is about.
at_a1_q3_r.hint: Say: It's about ... or I'm working on ...

at_a1_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: It is about the maths problem we were just doing. Let's keep going.

at_a1_q4.say: Ask if this is a good time to talk.
at_a1_q4.hint: Say: Is this a good time? or Do you have a minute?

at_a1_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask if this is a good time to talk.
at_a1_q4_r.hint: Say: Is this a good time? or Do you have a minute?

at_a1_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Is this a good time to ask, or should I come back?. Let's keep going.

at_a1_q5.say: The teacher says yes. Thank them for making time.
at_a1_q5.hint: Say: Thank you for making time for me

at_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The teacher says yes. Thank them for making time.
at_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: Thank you for making time for me

at_a1_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you so much for making time for me. Let's keep going.

at_a2_bridge.say: Now explain what you are struggling with.

at_a2_q1.say: Tell the teacher you have been trying to understand the problem.
at_a2_q1.hint: Say: I have been trying to figure it out

at_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell the teacher you have been trying to understand the problem.
at_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: I have been trying to figure it out

at_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I have been trying to figure it out on my own. Let's keep going.

at_a2_q2.say: Describe which part is confusing — for example the first step.
at_a2_q2.hint: Say: The part I don't get is ... or I get stuck at ...

at_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Describe which part is confusing — for example the first step.
at_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: The part I don't get is ... or I get stuck at ...

at_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: The part I don't get is the first step of the equation. Let's keep going.

at_a2_q3.say: Ask the teacher to explain that part again.
at_a2_q3.hint: Say: Could you explain that part again please?

at_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask the teacher to explain that part again.
at_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: Could you explain that part again please?

at_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Could you explain that part once more please?. Let's keep going.

at_a2_q4.say: The teacher asks if you understand. Say yes or no honestly.
at_a2_q4.hint: Say: Yes I think so or Not quite yet

at_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. The teacher asks if you understand. Say yes or no honestly.
at_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: Yes I think so or Not quite yet

at_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I think I understand the first part but not the second. Let's keep going.

at_a2_q5.say: Thank the teacher for being patient with you.
at_a2_q5.hint: Say: Thank you for being so patient

at_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Thank the teacher for being patient with you.
at_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: Thank you for being so patient

at_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for being so patient with me. Let's keep going.

at_a3_bridge.say: You are getting closer to understanding. Ask one more question.

at_a3_q1.say: Tell the teacher you have one more question.
at_a3_q1.hint: Say: I have one more quick question

at_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell the teacher you have one more question.
at_a3_q1_r.hint: Say: I have one more quick question

at_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I have just one more quick question if that is okay. Let's keep going.

at_a3_q2.hint: Say: How does ... work? or What does ... mean?

at_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask your follow-up question clearly.
at_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: How does ... work? or What does ... mean?

at_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: How does the second step connect to the first one?. Let's keep going.

at_a3_q3.say: Listen and say you think you understand now.
at_a3_q3.hint: Say: Oh I see, that makes sense now!

at_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Listen and say you think you understand now.
at_a3_q3_r.hint: Say: Oh I see, that makes sense now!

at_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Oh I see! That makes a lot of sense now. Thank you. Let's keep going.

at_a3_q4.say: Tell the teacher you will try the problem on your own.
at_a3_q4.hint: Say: I will try it on my own now

at_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell the teacher you will try the problem on your own.

ss_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: Hey, can we talk for a moment?

ss_a2_bridge.say: Face your friend and be ready to apologise.

ss_a2_q1.say: Look at your friend and say you want to say something important.
ss_a2_q1.hint: Say: I want to say something important to you

ss_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Look at your friend and say you want to say something important.
ss_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: I want to say something important to you

ss_a2_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I want to say something important to you if that is okay. Let's keep going.

ss_a2_q2.say: Say you are sorry clearly and directly.
ss_a2_q2.hint: Say: I am really sorry or I want to apologize

ss_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say you are sorry clearly and directly.
ss_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: I am really sorry or I want to apologize

ss_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am really sorry for what I said to you yesterday. Let's keep going.

ss_a2_q3.say: Be specific — tell them exactly what you are sorry for.
ss_a2_q3.hint: Say: I am sorry for saying ... or I am sorry that I...

ss_a2_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Be specific — tell them exactly what you are sorry for.
ss_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: I am sorry for saying ... or I am sorry that I...

ss_a2_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am sorry for saying something so unkind to you in front of others. Let's keep going.

ss_a2_q4.say: Tell them you understand that it hurt them.
ss_a2_q4.hint: Say: I understand that it hurt you

ss_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you understand that it hurt them.
ss_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: I understand that it hurt you

ss_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I understand that what I said must have really hurt you. Let's keep going.

ss_a2_q5.say: Tell them you did not mean to hurt them.
ss_a2_q5.hint: Say: I did not mean to hurt you

ss_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you did not mean to hurt them.
ss_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: I did not mean to hurt you

ss_a2_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I truly did not mean to hurt you. I regret it. Let's keep going.

ss_a3_q1.say: Do not make excuses — take full responsibility.
ss_a3_q1.hint: Say: It was my fault and I have no excuse

ss_a3_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Do not make excuses — take full responsibility.
ss_a3_q1_r.hint: Say: It was my fault and I have no excuse

ss_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: It was my fault. I have no excuse for the way I behaved. Let's keep going.

ss_a3_q2.say: Tell your friend it will not happen again.
ss_a3_q2.hint: Say: It will not happen again. I promise

ss_a3_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell your friend it will not happen again.
ss_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: It will not happen again. I promise

ss_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: It will not happen again. I promise to do better. Let's keep going.

ss_a3_q3.say: Ask your friend how they are feeling right now.
ss_a3_q3.hint: Say: How are you feeling right now?

ss_a3_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask your friend how they are feeling right now.
ss_a3_q3_r.hint: Say: How are you feeling right now?

ss_a3_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: How are you feeling right now? I really want to know. Let's keep going.

ss_a3_q4.say: Listen quietly while they speak without interrupting.
ss_a3_q4.hint: Say: I am listening. Take your time

ss_a3_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Listen quietly while they speak without interrupting.
ss_a3_q4_r.hint: Say: I am listening. Take your time

ss_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am listening. Please take your time and say everything you need to. Let's keep going.

ss_a3_q5.say: Acknowledge what they said and show empathy.
ss_a3_q5.hint: Say: I hear you and I understand why you feel that way

ss_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Acknowledge what they said and show empathy.
ss_a3_q5_r.hint: Say: I hear you and I understand why you feel that way

ss_a3_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I hear you. It makes complete sense that you feel that way. Let's keep going.

ss_a4_bridge.say: Asking if things can be okay between you.

ss_a4_q1.say: Ask your friend if they can forgive you.
ss_a4_q1.hint: Say: Can you forgive me? or I hope you can forgive me

ss_a4_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask your friend if they can forgive you.
ss_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: Can you forgive me? or I hope you can forgive me

ss_a4_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me. Let's keep going.

ss_a4_q2.say: Tell them your friendship means a lot to you.
ss_a4_q2.hint: Say: Our friendship means a lot to me

ss_a4_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them your friendship means a lot to you.
ss_a4_q2_r.hint: Say: Our friendship means a lot to me

ss_a4_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Our friendship means so much to me and I do not want to lose it. Let's keep going.

ss_a4_q3.say: Give them space if they need time to think.
ss_a4_q3.hint: Say: Take all the time you need

ss_a4_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Give them space if they need time to think.
ss_a4_q3_r.hint: Say: Take all the time you need

ss_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Take all the time you need. I will wait and respect that. Let's keep going.

ss_a4_q4.say: Tell them you are committed to being a better friend.
ss_a4_q4.hint: Say: I am going to work at being a better friend

ss_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you are committed to being a better friend.
ss_a4_q4_r.hint: Say: I am going to work at being a better friend

ss_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am committed to working on being a better friend to you. Let's keep going.

ss_a4_q5.say: Ask if there is anything you can do to make it up to them.
ss_a4_q5.hint: Say: Is there anything I can do to make it up to you?

ss_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask if there is anything you can do to make it up to them.
ss_a4_q5_r.hint: Say: Is there anything I can do to make it up to you?

ss_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: Is there anything at all I can do to make it up to you?. Let's keep going.

ss_a5_q1.say: Your friend says they appreciate the apology. Thank them for hearing you.
ss_a5_q1.hint: Say: Thank you for listening to me

ss_a5_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Your friend says they appreciate the apology. Thank them for hearing you.
ss_a5_q1_r.hint: Say: Thank you for listening to me

ss_a5_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for listening to me. That means a lot. Let's keep going.

ss_a5_q2.say: Reassure them you were not trying to be mean.
ss_a5_q2.hint: Say: I was not trying to be mean. I am truly sorry

ss_a5_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Reassure them you were not trying to be mean.
ss_a5_q2_r.hint: Say: I was not trying to be mean. I am truly sorry

ss_a5_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I was not trying to be mean at all. I am truly sorry. Let's keep going.

ss_a5_q3.say: Say something kind about your friend.
ss_a5_q3.hint: Say: You are a really great friend and I am lucky

ss_a5_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say something kind about your friend.
ss_a5_q3_r.hint: Say: You are a really great friend and I am lucky

ss_a5_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: You are such a great friend and I am really lucky to know you. Let's keep going.

ss_a5_q4.say: Ask if you can start fresh.

ss_a5_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask if you can start fresh.

ss_a5_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Can we start fresh and put this behind us?. Let's keep going.

ss_a5_q5.say: Your friend agrees. Say you are so relieved and grateful.
ss_a5_q5.hint: Say: I am so relieved and grateful. Thank you

ss_a5_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Your friend agrees. Say you are so relieved and grateful.
ss_a5_q5_r.hint: Say: I am so relieved and grateful. Thank you

ss_a5_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am so relieved and grateful. Thank you for giving me another chance. Let's keep going.

ss_a6_bridge.say: Making up and moving forward together.

ss_a6_q1.say: Suggest doing something fun together to make up.
ss_a6_q1.hint: Say: Let's do something fun together to make up!

ss_a6_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Suggest doing something fun together to make up.
ss_a6_q1_r.hint: Say: Let's do something fun together to make up!

ss_a6_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Let's do something fun together. My treat to make up for it. Let's keep going.

ss_a6_q2.say: They suggest an idea. Agree enthusiastically.
ss_a6_q2.hint: Say: That sounds perfect! I am in!

ss_a6_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They suggest an idea. Agree enthusiastically.
ss_a6_q2_r.hint: Say: That sounds perfect! I am in!

ss_a6_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: That sounds absolutely perfect! I am definitely in. Let's keep going.

ss_a6_q3.say: Tell them how much you appreciate their forgiveness.
ss_a6_q3.hint: Say: I really appreciate your forgiveness

ss_a6_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them how much you appreciate their forgiveness.
ss_a6_q3_r.hint: Say: I really appreciate your forgiveness

ss_a6_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I really appreciate you forgiving me. It means so much. Let's keep going.

ss_a6_q4.say: Say you have both learned something from this experience.
ss_a6_q4.hint: Say: I think we have both learned something from this

ss_a6_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say you have both learned something from this experience.
ss_a6_q4_r.hint: Say: I think we have both learned something from this

ss_a6_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I think we have both learned something valuable from this situation. Let's keep going.

ss_a6_q5.say: Say you want to be the kind of friend they can always count on.
ss_a6_q5.hint: Say: I want to be the kind of friend you can always count on

ss_a6_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Say you want to be the kind of friend they can always count on.
ss_a6_q5_r.hint: Say: I want to be the kind of friend you can always count on

ss_a6_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I want to be the kind of friend you can always count on. Let's keep going.

ss_a7_q1.say: Reflect privately on how the conversation went.
ss_a7_q1.hint: Say: I think the conversation went well

ss_a7_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Reflect privately on how the conversation went.
ss_a7_q1_r.hint: Say: I think the conversation went well

ss_a7_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: I think that conversation went as well as it could have. Let's keep going.

ss_a7_q2.say: Notice that you feel better now that you have apologised.
ss_a7_q2.hint: Say: I feel so much better now that I said sorry

ss_a7_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Notice that you feel better now that you have apologised.
ss_a7_q2_r.hint: Say: I feel so much better now that I said sorry

ss_a7_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel so much lighter now that I said sorry and meant it. Let's keep going.

ss_a7_q3.say: Remind yourself that being honest is always the right thing to do.
ss_a7_q3.hint: Say: Being honest is always the right thing to do

ss_a7_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Remind yourself that being honest is always the right thing to do.
ss_a7_q3_r.hint: Say: Being honest is always the right thing to do

ss_a7_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: Being honest and owning up to mistakes is always the right thing. Let's keep going.

ss_a7_q4.say: Decide you will think before you speak next time.
ss_a7_q4.hint: Say: I will think before I speak next time

ss_a7_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Decide you will think before you speak next time.
ss_a7_q4_r.hint: Say: I will think before I speak next time

ss_a7_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I will always think carefully before I speak next time. Let's keep going.

ss_a7_q5.say: Tell a trusted adult about what you learned today.
ss_a7_q5.hint: Say: I learned something important today

ss_a7_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell a trusted adult about what you learned today.
ss_a7_q5_r.hint: Say: I learned something important today

ss_a7_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: I learned something really important about friendship today. Let's keep going.

ss_a8_q1.say: Meet your friend the next day with a genuine smile.

ss_a8_q1_r.hint: Say: Hey! I am really glad to see you

ss_a8_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Hey! I am so glad to see you today. How are you doing?. Let's keep going.

ss_a8_q2.say: Ask how they slept and whether they are feeling okay.
ss_a8_q2.hint: Say: Did you sleep okay? Are you feeling better today?

ss_a8_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Ask how they slept and whether they are feeling okay.
ss_a8_q2_r.hint: Say: Did you sleep okay? Are you feeling better today?

ss_a8_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: Did you sleep okay? I hope you are feeling better today. Let's keep going.

ss_a8_q3.say: Mention you have been thinking about what happened and feel good about resolving it.
ss_a8_q3.hint: Say: I am glad we were able to resolve things

ss_a8_q3_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Mention you have been thinking about what happened and feel good about resolving it.
ss_a8_q3_r.hint: Say: I am glad we were able to resolve things

ss_a8_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am so glad we were able to talk things through and resolve it. Let's keep going.

ss_a8_q4.say: Tell them friendships get stronger when you work through hard moments.
ss_a8_q4.hint: Say: Friendships get stronger when we work through hard moments

ss_a8_q4_r.hint: Say: Friendships get stronger when we work through hard moments

ss_a8_q5_r.hint: Say: We are good. Let's stay good friends!

ss_win.say: You apologized beautifully — genuinely and kindly. That takes real courage. You earned a star!

sn_a1_bridge.say: A friend asks you to do something you do not want to do.

sn_a1_q1.say: Your friend asks if you want to skip class with them.
sn_a1_q1.hint: Say: No thanks or I don't think that is a good idea

sn_a1_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Your friend asks if you want to skip class with them.
sn_a1_q1_r.hint: Say: No thanks or I don't think that is a good idea

sn_a1_q2.hint: Say: I am not comfortable doing that

sn_a1_q2_r.hint: Say: I am not comfortable doing that

sn_a1_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am not comfortable doing that. It doesn't feel right to me. Let's keep going.

sn_a1_q5.say: Stay calm if they seem disappointed.

sn_a1_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Stay calm if they seem disappointed.
sn_a1_q5_r.hint: Say: It's okay if you are disappointed. I understand

sn_a2_q1.hint: Say: No I am still not going to do it

sn_a2_q1_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. They say come on, it will be fine. Hold your ground.
sn_a2_q1_r.hint: Say: No I am still not going to do it

sn_a2_q2_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Repeat your reason without getting angry.
sn_a2_q2_r.hint: Say: As I said, I am not comfortable with it

sn_a2_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: As I said, I am just not comfortable with it. That hasn't changed. Let's keep going.

sn_a2_q3_r.hint: Say: I value our friendship but this is my decision

sn_a2_q4.say: Stay calm and do not raise your voice.
sn_a2_q4.hint: Say: I am going to stay calm about this

sn_a2_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Stay calm and do not raise your voice.
sn_a2_q4_r.hint: Say: I am going to stay calm about this

sn_a2_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am going to stay calm. Raising my voice won't help anything. Let's keep going.

sn_a2_q5.hint: Say: Real friends respect each other's choices

sn_a2_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them real friends respect each other's decisions.
sn_a2_q5_r.hint: Say: Real friends respect each other's choices

sn_a3_bridge.say: They accept your no. Keep things friendly.

sn_a3_q1_t.say: No problem! You could say: Thank you for finally understanding. I appreciate that. Let's keep going.

sn_a3_q2_r.hint: Say: I still want to hang out — just not like this

sn_a3_q2_t.say: No problem! You could say: I still want to hang out with you. Just not in this way. Let's keep going.

sn_a3_q3.say: Suggest an alternative you are both comfortable with.

sn_a3_q4.say: They agree. Say you are glad you worked it out.

sn_a3_q4_r.hint: Say: I am glad we worked that out!

sn_a3_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: I am glad we could work it out together. That is what friends do. Let's keep going.

sn_a3_q5.say: Tell them you appreciate that they did not pressure you.
sn_a3_q5.hint: Say: I appreciate that you didn't pressure me

sn_a3_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Tell them you appreciate that they did not pressure you.
sn_a3_q5_r.hint: Say: I appreciate that you didn't pressure me

sn_a4_q1_r.hint: Say: Sorry I can't share my answers

sn_a4_q2_r.hint: Say: I can help you understand the work instead

sn_a4_q3.say: They agree. Feel good about your decision.
sn_a4_q3.hint: Say: I feel good about that decision

sn_a4_q3_r.hint: Say: I feel good about that decision

sn_a4_q3_t.say: No problem! You could say: I feel really good about that decision. It was the right choice. Let's keep going.

sn_a4_q4.say: Remind yourself that saying no is okay and healthy.
sn_a4_q4.hint: Say: Saying no is okay and healthy

sn_a4_q4_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Remind yourself that saying no is okay and healthy.
sn_a4_q4_r.hint: Say: Saying no is okay and healthy

sn_a4_q4_t.say: No problem! You could say: Saying no when something is wrong is okay and important. Let's keep going.

sn_a4_q5.say: Practice saying no clearly in a calm voice.
sn_a4_q5.hint: Say: No thank you or I don't think that is right for me

sn_a4_q5_r.say: No worries! Give it another try. Practice saying no clearly in a calm voice.
sn_a4_q5_r.hint: Say: No thank you or I don't think that is right for me

sn_a4_q5_t.say: No problem! You could say: No thank you. That is not something I want to do. Let's keep going.

sn_a5_bridge.say: Reflecting on why saying no matters.

sn_a5_q1.say: Think about why it is important to say no sometimes.
sn_a5_q1.hint: Say: It is important to know when to say no
